heading: Enforcement
label: 12133 Enforcement
text: The remedies, procedures, and rights set forth in shall be the remedies, procedures, and rights this subchapter provides to any person alleging discrimination on the basis of disability in violation of .section 794a of title 29section 12132 of this title
notes: Effective DateSection effective 18 months after , see , set out as a note under .July 26, 1990section 205(a) of Pub. L. 101–336section 12131 of this title
